texto: What could anyone confess that would be worth anything or serve any useful purpose? What has happened to us has either happened to everyone or to us alone
autor: if the former it has no novelty value and if the latter it will be incomprehensible.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de if the former it has no novelty value and if the latter it will be incomprehensible. que provoca temas ligados a autoestima. Ao questionar “What could anyone confess that would be worth anything or serve any useful purpose? What has happ…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre autoestima, fernando-pessoa, the-book-of-disquiet, com foco em the-book-of-disquiet.
